Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Eiselman for and with Ignacio Luna, Jr.

Counsel requested a one month continuance for compliance of the settlement agreement. The Petition for Instructions Confirming Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to May 13, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Confirming Removal Of Trustee & Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Apr-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Confirming Removal Of Trustee & Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Eiselman for Ignacio Luna, Jr. (Trustee). Alec Harrington for Victoria Luna and Maria Luna.

The Parties stipulate to the accounting. The Court informed Counsel that separate orders are needed for the accounting and for approval of the settlement. The Court allowed the accounting petition (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). The Court granted the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Instructions was continued to February 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on execution of the settlement agreement.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Trustee To Approve Settlement Agreement; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions Confirming Removal Of Trustee & Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Eiselman for and with Ignacio Luna, Jr. (Petitioner). Alec Harrington for Maria Luna and Victoria Luna.

Mr. Eiselman stated that a waiver of notice from Andres Luna was filed on January 30, 2013. The Court advised Counsel that a petition for approval of the settlement agreement is needed. The Court also stated that the parties can submit the petition and waive any objections if they wanted the Court to approve the accounting. The accounting petition and the petition for instructions were continued to January 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for approval of settlement agreement with waiver of notice (said petition is to be set with the hearing date of January 21, 2014.)

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Confirming Removal Of Trustee & Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jul-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Stanaland for and with Victoria Luna. Robert Eiselman for and with Ignacio Luna, Jr. Francisco Hulse (Interpreter-Spanish) was also present. Maria Luna was also present.

Mr. Eiselman waives direct notice to his Client. Mr. Stanaland stated that he believes the value of the Trust to be over $3,000,000.00, that the Trust is amendable and revocable, that the Trustee refuses to do an accounting, that the Trustee encumberred the property, that Ms. Luna does not want Ignacio to be the Trustee, and that the majority of the Beneficiaries agree to have Ignacio Luna removed and replaced with Maria Luna. Mr. Eisleman stated that the books and records were turned over to Mr. Stanaland on March 28th, that they engaged in services of a Bookkeeper/Accountant to prepare an accounting, that there is nothing to support the allegations and raised the issue of undue influence. Counsel also raised the issue of collection of rents (Tenants were told to pay rent to Maria) and stated that they are both ameenable to having an independent Trustee/Fiduciary. Victoria Luna addressed the Court. The Court stated that it would be helpful to have an accounting pursuant to Probate Code 1060 filed with a petition to settle the accounting. The Court also stated that Ignacio Luna needs to remain in place as Trustee and that Mr. Luna shall not emcumber or sell any Trust property until further order of the Court. Furthermore, the Court stated that it only sees problems and confusion with both Parties claiming to be the Trustee, that it is causing confusion with the Tenants, that it complicates the accountings, that it creates more animosity and encouraged the Family to figure this out. Mr. Luna is to file an accounting for the period of June 1, 2008 through December 31, 2012. Status on filing of a petition to approve the accounting is set for July 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Instructions was also continued to July 09, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Eiselman is to prepare an order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/ Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
